response.overview: Pentimenti Productions is thrilled to release "Congregating Creativity," a short documenting an artist residency program at the First Presbyterian Church in Woodlawn featuring the incredible work of Max Li, Messejah Washington, Ameera Pernebsati Lys, and Dozzy Ibekwe. The film surveys the history of the church and residency program, and explores how this unique environment of the church impacts the artists and their work.  Filmmakers: Alexandra Antoine, Jazz Echevarría, Courtney Niquia Larry, Violet Law, Sawyer Muir, Érika Ordosgoitti, Cedric A. Thurman, Vee Villareal
response.title: Congregating Creativity
